member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrRequest
member.summary: Represents a Certificate Signing Request (CSR) submitted during registration. Each registration generates two CSRs: one for device certificate and one for user certificate.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrRequest.RegistrationId
member.summary: Reference to the pending registration.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrRequest.Type
member.summary: Type of CSR (Device or User).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrRequest.CsrData
member.summary: The CSR data in DER format (Base64 encoded for storage).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrRequest.SubjectDn
member.summary: Subject DN extracted from the CSR.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrRequest.PublicKey
member.summary: Public key extracted from the CSR (for fingerprint/verification).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrRequest.PublicKeyFingerprint
member.summary: SHA-256 hash of the public key for quick lookup.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrRequest.Status
member.summary: Status of the CSR processing.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrRequest.IssuedCertificateId
member.summary: Reference to the issued certificate (once approved and issued).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrRequest.RejectionReason
member.summary: Rejection reason if CSR was rejected.
Reconstitutes a CsrRequest entity from persistence.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrType
member.summary: Type of Certificate Signing Request.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrType.Device
member.summary: CSR for device certificate (device identity).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrType.User
member.summary: CSR for user certificate (user identity/signing).

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrStatus
member.summary: Status of CSR processing.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrStatus.Pending
member.summary: CSR submitted, awaiting processing.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrStatus.Approved
member.summary: CSR validated and approved, ready for certificate issuance.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrStatus.Issued
member.summary: Certificate has been issued for this CSR.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.CsrStatus.Rejected
member.summary: CSR was rejected (invalid format, verification failed, etc.).

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession
member.summary: Represents a device transfer session for securely moving identity from one device to another. Uses KAZ-KEM for encrypted key transfer between devices.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.UserId
member.summary: The user performing the transfer.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.SourceDeviceId
member.summary: The source device (current device initiating transfer).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.TargetDeviceId
member.summary: The target device (new device receiving identity). Null until scanned.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.QrCodeData
member.summary: QR code data for the transfer (contains session info + KAZ-KEM public key).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.EncapsulatedKey
member.summary: KAZ-KEM encapsulated key for secure channel (set when new device scans QR).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.Status
member.summary: Current status of the transfer.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the transfer session was created.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.ExpiresAt
member.summary: When the transfer session expires.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.CompletedAt
member.summary: When the transfer was completed (if successful).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message if transfer failed.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.TargetDeviceName
member.summary: Information about the new device (set when scanned).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.TargetPlatform
member.summary: Platform of the new device.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.Create(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new device transfer session.
member.param: QR code data containing session info and KAZ-KEM public key.
How long the transfer session is valid (default 5 minutes).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.EstablishSession(System.Guid,System.String,Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DevicePlatform,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Records when the new device scans the QR code and establishes KAZ-KEM session.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.StartKeyTransfer
member.summary: Marks that key transfer is in progress.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.Complete
member.summary: Completes the transfer successfully.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.Cancel
member.summary: Cancels the transfer.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.Fail(System.String)
member.summary: Marks the transfer as failed with an error message.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.IsExpired
member.summary: Checks if the session has expired.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession.MarkExpired
member.summary: Marks the session as expired.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare
member.summary:
Represents an encrypted key share stored on the backend. Used for Shamir's Secret Sharing (2-of-3) of the user's private key.
Key shares: - part_user: Stored on user's device (not in this entity) - part_control: Stored by backend (encrypted with system KEM pubkey) - part_recovery: Encrypted with user's recovery password

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.UserId
member.summary: Reference to the user who owns this key share. Set after registration completion.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.RegistrationId
member.summary: Reference to the pending registration (before user creation).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.Type
member.summary: Type of key share.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.EncryptedData
member.summary: Encrypted share data. For part_control: KEM encapsulated with system public key. For part_recovery: AES-GCM encrypted with recovery password derived key.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.EncapsulatedKey
member.summary: For KEM-encrypted shares: the encapsulated key ciphertext. For AES-GCM encrypted shares: null.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.Nonce
member.summary: For AES-GCM encrypted shares: the nonce/IV.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.AuthTag
member.summary: For AES-GCM encrypted shares: the authentication tag.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.Salt
member.summary: Salt used for key derivation (for recovery password shares).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.ShareIndex
member.summary: Index of this share in the Shamir scheme (1, 2, or 3).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this share is still active (not revoked/replaced).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.CreateControlShare(System.Guid,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Creates a control share (part_control) encrypted with system KEM public key.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.CreateRecoveryShare(System.Guid,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Creates a recovery share (part_recovery) encrypted with user's recovery password.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.LinkToUser(System.Guid,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Links this key share to a user after registration completion.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.Deactivate(System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Deactivates this key share (e.g., when user changes recovery password).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShare.UpdateEncryptedData(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Replaces this share's encrypted data (e.g., when recovery password changes).
Reconstitutes a KeyShare entity from persistence.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShareType
member.summary: Type of key share in the 2-of-3 Shamir secret sharing scheme.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShareType.User
member.summary: User's share (part_user) - stored on device only. This value is never used for KeyShare entity, just for reference.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShareType.Control
member.summary: Control share (part_control) - stored by backend, encrypted with system KEM pubkey.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.KeyShareType.Recovery
member.summary: Recovery share (part_recovery) - encrypted with user's recovery password.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.PendingRegistration
member.summary: Represents a pending user registration following the full registration flow: Profile Setup → Email OTP → Phone OTP → CSR Submission → Certificate Issuance → Complete

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken
member.summary: Represents a recovery token for account recovery. The recovery token contains the encrypted part_recovery share and metadata. User must save this token offline for emergency recovery.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.UserId
member.summary: Reference to the user who owns this recovery token.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.TokenVersion
member.summary: Token version (incremented when recovery password changes).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.TokenHash
member.summary: Hash of the token for verification (SHA-256). The actual token is never stored, only its hash.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.KeyShareId
member.summary: Reference to the associated recovery key share.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this token is still active.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.LastUsedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when this token was last used for recovery.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.UseCount
member.summary: Number of times this token has been used for recovery.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.LastRecoveryIp
member.summary: IP address when recovery was initiated.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.RecordUsage(System.String)
member.summary: Records that this token was used for a recovery operation.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.Deactivate(System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Deactivates this recovery token (e.g., when generating a new one).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken.VerifyTokenHash(System.String)
member.summary: Verifies if the provided token hash matches this token.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.User
member.summary: Represents a user in the identity system. Note: Single device policy - each user can only have ONE registered device.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.User.FullName
member.summary: User's full name as per MyKad (Malaysian IC).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.User.MyKadNumber
member.summary: Malaysian IC number (MyKad). Unique identifier for Malaysian citizens. Format: 12 digits (YYMMDD-PB-###G)

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.User.Device
member.summary: The user's registered device (single device policy - only one device allowed).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.User.HasRegisteredDevice
member.summary: Whether the user has a registered device.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.User.RegisterDevice(Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice)
member.summary: Registers a device for this user. Due to single device policy, any existing device will be deactivated.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.User.GetActiveDevice
member.summary: Gets the current device if active, otherwise returns null.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserCredential
member.summary: Represents an authentication credential for a user.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice
member.summary: Represents a user's registered device. IMPORTANT: Single device policy - each user can only have ONE device at a time. To change devices, a secure device transfer must be performed.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.UserId
member.summary: The user who owns this device.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.DeviceId
member.summary: Unique device identifier (fingerprint/attestation).

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.DeviceName
member.summary: Human-readable device name (e.g., "Samsung Galaxy S24").

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.Platform
member.summary: Device platform/OS.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.OsVersion
member.summary: OS version string.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.AppVersion
member.summary: App version installed on the device.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.PushToken
member.summary: Device push notification token for alerts.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.PublicKeyFingerprint
member.summary: Public key fingerprint for device attestation.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.Status
member.summary: Current status of the device.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.LastAuthenticatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp of the last successful authentication from this device.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.LastIpAddress
member.summary: IP address of the last authentication.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.LastLocation
member.summary: Geographic location of the last authentication (if available).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.Create(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DevicePlatform,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Creates a new device registration for a user. This should only be called when no existing device exists (new registration) or after a successful device transfer (old device deactivated).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.RecordAuthentication(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Records a successful authentication from this device.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.UpdateInfo(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates device information (app version, push token, etc.).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.InitiateTransfer
member.summary: Initiates a device transfer - locks the device until transfer completes.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.CancelTransfer
member.summary: Cancels a pending transfer and restores the device to active status.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice.Deactivate
member.summary: Deactivates this device after successful transfer to a new device. Keys should be securely erased from this device after this call.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserSession
member.summary: Represents an active user session.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.CredentialType
member.summary: Represents the type of authentication credential.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.CredentialType.Passkey
member.summary: FIDO2/WebAuthn passkey credential.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.CredentialType.Totp
member.summary: Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.CredentialType.RecoveryCode
member.summary: Recovery code for account recovery.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.CredentialType.SecurityKey
member.summary: Hardware security key (e.g., YubiKey).

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DeviceStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a user's device. Note: Single device policy - each user can only have ONE device at a time.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DeviceStatus.Active
member.summary: Device is active and can be used for authentication.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DeviceStatus.TransferPending
member.summary: Device transfer is pending - device is locked until transfer completes or is cancelled.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DeviceStatus.Deactivated
member.summary: Device has been deactivated after transfer to a new device.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.TransferStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a device transfer session.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.TransferStatus.Initiated
member.summary: Transfer initiated, waiting for new device to scan QR code.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.TransferStatus.SessionEstablished
member.summary: New device has scanned QR, KAZ-KEM session established.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.TransferStatus.KeysTransferring
member.summary: Keys are being transferred (encrypted with KAZ-KEM).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.TransferStatus.Completed
member.summary: Transfer completed successfully.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.TransferStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Transfer was cancelled by user.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.TransferStatus.Expired
member.summary: Transfer expired (timeout).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.TransferStatus.Failed
member.summary: Transfer failed due to an error.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DevicePlatform
member.summary: Represents the platform/OS of a device.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DevicePlatform.Android
member.summary: Android device.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DevicePlatform.iOS
member.summary: iOS device.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DevicePlatform.Windows
member.summary: Windows device.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DevicePlatform.MacOS
member.summary: macOS device.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DevicePlatform.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown platform.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.RegistrationStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a pending registration. Follows the registration flow: Profile → Email OTP → Phone OTP → CSR → Certificate → Complete

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.RegistrationStatus.Pending
member.summary: Registration initiated, awaiting email verification.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.RegistrationStatus.EmailVerified
member.summary: Email verified via OTP, awaiting phone verification.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.RegistrationStatus.PhoneVerified
member.summary: Phone verified via OTP, awaiting CSR submission.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.RegistrationStatus.CsrSubmitted
member.summary: CSR submitted, awaiting certificate issuance.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.RegistrationStatus.CertificatesIssued
member.summary: Certificates issued, awaiting device activation.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.RegistrationStatus.Completed
member.summary: Registration completed, user account fully activated.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.RegistrationStatus.Expired
member.summary: Registration expired, OTP no longer valid.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.RegistrationStatus.Rejected
member.summary: Registration rejected (e.g., invalid CSR, duplicate MyKad).

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.UserStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a user account.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.UserStatus.PendingVerification
member.summary: User is pending email/phone verification.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.UserStatus.Active
member.summary: User account is active and can authenticate.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.UserStatus.Suspended
member.summary: User account is suspended (temporary).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.UserStatus.Locked
member.summary: User account is locked due to failed login attempts.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.UserStatus.Deactivated
member.summary: User account is deactivated (soft delete).

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceRegisteredEvent
member.summary: Raised when a new device is registered for a user. Note: Due to single device policy, this replaces any previous device.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceRegisteredEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DevicePlatform)
member.summary: Raised when a new device is registered for a user. Note: Due to single device policy, this replaces any previous device.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferInitiatedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a device transfer is initiated from the source device.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferInitiatedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Raised when a device transfer is initiated from the source device.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferCancelledEvent
member.summary: Raised when a device transfer is cancelled.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferCancelledEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Raised when a device transfer is cancelled.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceDeactivatedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a device is deactivated (after successful transfer or manual deactivation).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceDeactivatedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Raised when a device is deactivated (after successful transfer or manual deactivation).

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferSessionCreatedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a new device transfer session is created (QR code generated).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferSessionCreatedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Raised when a new device transfer session is created (QR code generated).

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferSessionEstablishedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a new device scans the QR and KAZ-KEM session is established.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferSessionEstablishedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Raised when a new device scans the QR and KAZ-KEM session is established.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferCompletedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a device transfer completes successfully.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferCompletedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Raised when a device transfer completes successfully.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferFailedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a device transfer fails.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Events.DeviceTransferFailedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Raised when a device transfer fails.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.ICsrRequestRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for CsrRequest aggregate.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IDeviceTransferSessionRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for device transfer session operations.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IDeviceTransferSessionRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a transfer session by its ID.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IDeviceTransferSessionRepository.GetActiveSessionByUserIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an active (non-completed) transfer session for a user.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IDeviceTransferSessionRepository.GetByQrCodeDataAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a transfer session by its QR code data (for scanning).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IDeviceTransferSessionRepository.HasActiveSessionAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if a user has an active transfer session.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IDeviceTransferSessionRepository.CreateAsync(Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new transfer session.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IDeviceTransferSessionRepository.UpdateAsync(Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.DeviceTransferSession,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing transfer session.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IDeviceTransferSessionRepository.GetTransferHistoryByUserIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets transfer history for a user.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IDeviceTransferSessionRepository.GetExpiredSessionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all expired sessions that need to be marked as expired.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IDeviceTransferSessionRepository.MarkExpiredSessionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks expired sessions as expired status.

member.summary: Repository interface for KeyShare aggregate.

member.summary: Repository interface for PendingRegistration aggregate.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IRecoveryTokenRepository
member.summary: Repository for managing recovery tokens.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IRecoveryTokenRepository.CreateAsync(Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.RecoveryToken,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new recovery token.

member.summary: Gets a recovery token by ID.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IRecoveryTokenRepository.GetActiveByUserIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the active recovery token for a user.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IRecoveryTokenRepository.GetByUserIdAndHashAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a recovery token by user ID and token hash.

member.summary: Updates a recovery token.

member.summary: Deactivates all recovery tokens for a user.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserCredentialRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for UserCredential entity.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserDeviceRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for user device operations. Note: Single device policy - each user can only have ONE active device.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserDeviceRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a device by its ID.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserDeviceRepository.GetActiveDeviceByUserIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the active device for a user. Due to single device policy, this returns at most one device.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserDeviceRepository.GetByDeviceIdAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a device by its device fingerprint/ID.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserDeviceRepository.HasActiveDeviceAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if a user has an active device registered.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserDeviceRepository.CreateAsync(Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new device registration.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserDeviceRepository.UpdateAsync(Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Entities.UserDevice,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing device.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserDeviceRepository.GetDeviceHistoryByUserIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets device history for a user (including deactivated devices).

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for User aggregate.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Interfaces.IUserSessionRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for UserSession entity.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.ValueObjects.Email
member.summary: Represents an email address value object.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.ValueObjects.Email.GenerateEmailRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[^@\\s]+@[^@\\s]+\\.[^@\\s]+$
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [^@\s] atomically at least once.
○ Match '@'.
○ Match a character in the set [^@\s] greedily at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character in the set [^@\s] atomically at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.ValueObjects.PhoneNumber
member.summary: Represents a phone number value object in E.164 format.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.ValueObjects.PhoneNumber.GeneratePhoneRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\+[1-9]\\d{6,14}$
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match '+'.
○ Match a character in the set [1-9].
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least 6 and at most 14 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GenerateEmailRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the GenerateEmailRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GenerateEmailRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GenerateEmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GenerateEmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GenerateEmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GenerateEmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GenerateEmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.
